positive: Minimalist abstract representation of a soaring mountain peak silhouette, viewed during the golden hour. The peak should be rendered in deep charcoal and matte black against a gradient sky of warm terracotta, faded cyan, and soft lavender. Incorporate subtle, geometric lines suggesting wind currents and ascent path. Style: Modern graphic design, flat vector art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing. Composition: Centralized, clean silhouette with strong negative space, high contrast, and defined edges. Lighting: Soft directional backlighting emphasizing the outline. Color direction: Earth tones, pastels, and deep contrast. Print-friendly details: Optimized for repeating tile pattern or single centered graphic.
